gloss: the frequency of occurring without exception across all instances
unqualified certainty about the asserted proposition

a near-negative degree barely meeting a threshold
emphatic confirmation of a preceding assertion
a tentative possibility without committed certainty
the frequency of occurring on zero instances

the frequency of occurring on many but not all instances

the frequency of occurring on an indefinite portion of instances
high confidence in the truth of a claim
the frequency of occurring on most typical instances
affirm assent to a preceding question or claim
